examples: So wary did we become that the twang of the Tambura, scared us away.
And as we went out for our walk in the morning, every now and then would appear a Tambura, [26] slung over a shoulder, at which we felt like game birds at the sight of the muzzle of the hunter's gun.
Typical musical instruments are the ''sopele'' shawms, always played in a pair, bagpipes, flutes and the ''tambura'' lute.
Lead singers interchange vocal lines while creating, emulating and combining decasyllabic verses and shaping the melody, all the while accompanied by a group of singers and tambura band.
